entropyScale(String) - Method in class passwordutils.analysis.StrengthTools
Evaluates the security level of a password based on its calculated bit entropy.

Evaluates the security level of a password based on its calculated bit entropy.

This method formats the time in seconds to years and day that it would take the key to break.

generateHash(String) - Static method in class passwordutils.crypto.HashManager
That static method generate a Hash code for a password for first time and save in HashResult object.
generateSalt(int) - Method in class passwordutils.crypto.SaltManager
Generate a random salt, the salt prevents two users have the same hash.
generatorPassword() - Method in interface passwordutils.generators.InterfaceRandGen
 
generatorPassword() - Method in class passwordutils.generators.PasswordGenerator
This method generates a random password from any parameter beacause is a random length and returns the password the limits of length are [16, 40] characters, 16 is the secure min and 40 is a good max limit of lenght.
generatorPassword(long) - Method in interface passwordutils.generators.InterfaceRandGen
 
generatorPassword(long) - Method in class passwordutils.generators.PasswordGenerator
This method generates a random password from length passed in parameters and returns the password

HashManager - Class in passwordutils.crypto
Utility class for secure password hashing.

HashResult - Class in passwordutils.crypto
That object saves hash, salt and iterations of a previously encoded password with HashManager.
HashResult(byte[], byte[], int) - Constructor for class passwordutils.crypto.HashResult
 
hashVerify(String, HashResult) - Static method in class passwordutils.crypto.HashManager
That static method verify if a login password matches with the hash previously generated by the password that params has been saved in the object HashResult.

secureBreach(String) - Method in class passwordutils.analysis.StrengthTools
Analyzes the password passed by parameters under the criteria of: +8 length and at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one symbol, and one number
